channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Stripping U.S. citizenship en masse is harder than Trump vowed
item.description: President Trump's promise to revoke citizenship worries advocates and scholars, but so far it is proving difficult to implement.

item.title: EU strikes migration deal for more deportations and detention centers abroad
item.description: The European Union has advanced a migration policy overhaul to increase deportations and build detention centers overseas.

item.title: Appeals court rules Pentagon policy illegally barred transgender troops from military
item.description: A divided appeals court panel found that a Trump-era policy unlawfully prohibited transgender individuals from serving in the military.

item.title: Michigan eases vaccine exemption rules for parents, reversing earlier strict policy
item.description: A decade after high non-vaccination rates, Michigan is relaxing its requirement for parents to attend an in-person class to obtain a vaccine exemption.
